channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump didn't endorse them, but they're acting like he did
item.description: Republican candidates snubbed by President Trump for primary endorsements have found a workaround: Act like he endorsed them anyway. Why it matters: T...

item.title: U.S. launches investigation after Cuba kills 4 on Florida boat
item.description: U.S. officials are looking into an announcement by Cuba's government that it killed four people aboard a Florida-tagged boat near the Villa Clara coas...

item.title: U.S.-Iran nuclear negotiators meet for 3 hours with Trump decision looming
item.description: President Trump's envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner have held more than three hours of negotiations with Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi ...

item.title: How Claude conquered Washington, Wall Street and Silicon Valley
item.description: Supremacy can be fleeting in the highly competitive AI race. But two months into 2026, Anthropic's Claude is upending U.S. national security, roiling ...

item.title: Wiles "in shock" over FBI phone-record subpoena
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel says the FBI under President Biden subpoenaed his phone records and those of Susie Wiles, who ran President Trump's campaign a...

item.title: One week into DHS shutdown, dogs in costume parade through the Senate
item.description: Forward momentum in the Senate came from a parade of dogs in Mardi Gras costumes as senators remain stuck on DHS funding.

item.title: Prosecution of Kilmar Abrego García faces critical test in court hearing
item.description: Justice Department lawyers must convince a federal judge that they did not seek to indict the Maryland man in retaliation for his successful challenge...

item.title: Ranking the 2028 Democratic presidential contenders
item.description: The early race is wide open.

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
Republicans think they laid an immigration trap ahead of the midterms
item.description: Republicans still see immigration as a potent political issue, even as polling shows them losing their longtime edge on the topic.

item.title: Trump stirred rumors for years. Now, it’s the Clintons’ turn to speak about Epstein.
item.description: Bill and Hillary Clinton have survived decades of scrutiny and conspiracy theories. Often, their adversaries come out on the losing end.

item.title: ‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
